'''Boss Roke''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was head of one of the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], serving as a subordinate to [[Moruth Doole]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a mysterious, [[Energy spider|many-legged creature]] while seeking out a large deposit of [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] deep within one of the mines. At the time he was accompanied by [[Kyp Durron]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who barely escaped alive.
